seo.title: 4-Day Agadir to Marrakech Desert Tour
seo.metaDescription: Travel from Agadir to Marrakech on a 4-day desert tour via Taroudant, Dades Valley, Merzouga camel trek, Erg Chebbi, and Ouarzazate.
seo.lead: A 4-day Agadir to Marrakech desert tour for travelers who want to connect Morocco's Atlantic coast, Anti-Atlas landscapes, Sahara dunes, and the Red City.

price.label: Custom quote
price.note: Final pricing depends on travel dates, group size, accommodation level, and private or shared transport. Send your dates for an exact quote.

seo.imageAlt: Agadir to Marrakech desert tour route through Anti-Atlas valleys and Merzouga dunes
highlights: Depart from Agadir and travel through Taroudant
Cross Anti-Atlas scenery toward Ouarzazate and Dades Valley
Camel trek and overnight camp in Merzouga
Finish in Marrakech after the High Atlas crossing

faqs.question: Can I start this Morocco desert tour in Agadir?
faqs.answer: Yes. This route is built for travelers starting in Agadir and ending in Marrakech after visiting the desert.

faqs.question: Does the tour visit Merzouga?
faqs.answer: Yes. The itinerary reaches Merzouga for a camel trek, sunset, desert camp, and Sahara sunrise.

faqs.question: Is this tour good after a beach stay in Agadir?
faqs.answer: Yes. It is a practical way to turn an Agadir beach stay into a desert and Marrakech itinerary without backtracking.

faqs.question: What should I bring for the desert night?
faqs.answer: Pack warm layers, sunglasses, sunscreen, a hat, comfortable shoes, and a small bag for the camp night.

faqs.question: Can the itinerary be extended?
faqs.answer: Yes. Extra nights can be added in Merzouga, Dades Valley, Ouarzazate, or Marrakech.

jsonLd.name: Coastal and Desert Odyssey - 4 Days
jsonLd.description: Experience the best of Morocco's coast and desert on this 4-day odyssey from Agadir to Marrakech via the Anti-Atlas Mountains and Sahara Desert.
